nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives incoming webhooks from WhatsApp Cloud API. GET handles verification challenges; POST processes inbound messages. Responds 200 to everything (lastNode mode sends last node output as response).

nodes.name: Message Parser
nodes.notes: Normalizes incoming WhatsApp payload into a standard format. Handles both GET verification and POST message processing. Extracts phone, message_type, message_body, media_id, is_media, timestamp from WhatsApp Cloud API format.

nodes.name: Session Manager
nodes.notes: Loads or creates session from n8n Data Store. Key format: session:{phone}. Creates new session with state=START if not found. Deletes expired sessions (>30min) and re-creates. TTL: 1800s.

nodes.name: State Router
nodes.notes: Routes messages by session.state. Output 0=START, 1=WAIT_PHONE, 2=WAIT_NAME, 3=WAIT_EMAIL, 4=WAIT_CONFIRMATION, 5=SEARCH_PARTICIPANT, 6=REGISTER_PARTICIPANT, 7=WAIT_TICKET, 8=UPLOAD_TICKET, 9=PROCESS_INVOICE, 10=REGISTER_PURCHASE, 11=ACCEPT_ENTRY, 12=FINISHED, 13=ERROR, 14=default (unrecognized state).

nodes.name: Welcome Handler
nodes.notes: Handles START state: sends welcome message, transitions session state to WAIT_PHONE, resets retry_count. Routes to Session Update after processing.

nodes.name: Phone Validator
nodes.notes: Strips non-numeric chars from input, validates exactly 10 digits (Colombia), normalizes with +57 prefix. Two outputs: output 0=valid (routes to Search Participant), output 1=invalid (routes to Session Update for error reply). COUNTRY_CODE and PHONE_DIGITS configurable via env vars.

nodes.name: Search Participant
nodes.notes: Sends GET to Superlikers API to search for participant by phone. URL: {SUPERLIKERS_BASE_URL}/campaigns/{SUPERLIKERS_CAMPAIGN}/participants/search?phone={phone}. Auth via X-API-Key header. Retries 3 times with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s). Includes full response (body + statusCode) for downstream routing.

nodes.name: Participant Exists
nodes.notes: Branches on HTTP response status from Search Participant. Output 0=200 (found → store participant data, state=WAIT_TICKET). Output 1=404 (not found → state=WAIT_NAME, ask for name). Output 2=fallback (error handling for 4xx/5xx/timeout).

nodes.name: Session Update
nodes.notes: Applies partial updates to session based on the current action: welcome, phone validation (valid/invalid), participant search (200/404/error), registration flow (name_captured, email_captured, confirmed, cancelled), or participant creation (201). Resets retry_count on state change. Persists to Data Store with TTL 1800.

nodes.name: Message Builder
nodes.notes: Builds the WhatsApp message payload based on session state and context. Handles: GET verification (returns challenge), status updates (returns 'ok'), handler replyMessage, state-based auto-replies, and error messages. Output format: { to, type, text: { body } }.

nodes.name: Name Handler
nodes.notes: Captures user's name. Validates: min 3 chars, only letters and spaces. Output 0=valid (name_captured, WAIT_EMAIL), Output 1=invalid (stay WAIT_NAME, error reply).

nodes.name: Email Validator
nodes.notes: Validates email format. Output 0=valid (email_captured, WAIT_CONFIRMATION with name+email summary), Output 1=invalid (stay WAIT_EMAIL, error reply).

nodes.name: Confirmation Handler
nodes.notes: Parses user confirmation (Sí/No). Output 0=Sí (REGISTER_PARTICIPANT), Output 1=No (reset to WAIT_NAME, clear name+email), Output 2=fallback (stay WAIT_CONFIRMATION, retry).

nodes.name: Register Participant
nodes.notes: POST to create new participant in Superlikers. Body: { phone, name, email } with X-API-Key auth. Retries 3x exponential. Output includes statusCode and body for routing.

nodes.name: Registration Result
nodes.notes: Routes registration result. Output 0=201 (success → WAIT_TICKET via Session Update), Output 1=4xx/5xx (error → retry via Session Update), Output 2=fallback (network error → Session Update).

nodes.name: WAIT_TICKET Router
nodes.notes: Routes WAIT_TICKET messages. Output 0=image (proceed to upload). Output 1=fallback (text, re-prompt user to send a photo).

nodes.name: Download WhatsApp Media
nodes.notes: Downloads ticket image binary from WhatsApp Cloud API using media_id. Response is binary (file format) passed directly to Upload node. WHATSAPP_TOKEN must be configured.

nodes.name: Upload Ticket API
nodes.notes: Uploads ticket image via POST /tickets/upload. Multipart/form-data field 'image' from previous node's binary. Retries 3x exponential backoff. Returns photo_id, url, size_bytes, mime_type.

nodes.name: Upload Result
nodes.notes: Routes upload result. Output 0=200 (ok, store photo_id -> UPLOAD_TICKET). Output 1=4xx/5xx (error, retry/re-prompt). Output 2=fallback (network error).

nodes.name: Process Invoice

value.content: Eres un extractor de datos de facturas y tickets de compra. Devuelve SOLO un JSON valido con estos campos: amount (numero), currency (string, ej: MXN), date (string YYYY-MM-DD), merchant_name (string), items (array de objetos con name, quantity, price), confidence_score (numero 0-1).

content.text: Extrae los datos de esta factura o ticket de compra:

nodes.notes: Sends ticket image to OpenAI Vision API (gpt-4o) for OCR extraction. Uses photo_url from session. Expects JSON response with amount, currency, date, merchant_name, items, confidence_score. Timeout 45s, retry 2x.

nodes.name: Invoice Validator
nodes.notes: Validates OpenAI Vision JSON output. Output 0=valid (confidence >= 0.7, has amount/merchant_name/date). Output 1=invalid (low confidence or missing fields → retry WAIT_TICKET).

nodes.name: Register Purchase
nodes.notes: POST to register purchase in Superlikers. Body: { participant_id, photo_id, invoice_data }. Handles 201 (ok), 409 (duplicate → use existing_purchase_id).

nodes.name: Purchase Result
nodes.notes: Routes purchase registration result. Output 0=201 (ok → Accept Entry). Output 1=409 (duplicate → still Accept Entry with existing_purchase_id). Output 2=fallback (error → ERROR).

nodes.name: Accept Entry
nodes.notes: PUT to accept entry/approve activity participation. Body: { participant_id, purchase_id, action: 'approve' }. Returns points_awarded, total_points.

nodes.name: Entry Result
nodes.notes: Routes entry acceptance result. Output 0=200 (ok → Points Builder). Output 1=fallback (error → ERROR).

nodes.name: Points Builder
nodes.notes: Builds final message with points summary from Accept Entry response. Sets state=FINISHED. Displays points_awarded and total_points.
